name: Flaming Sphere
description: You create a 5-foot-diameter sphere of fire in an unoccupied space on the ground within range. Any creature that ends its turn within 5 feet of the sphere makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking 2d6 Fire damage on a failed save or half as much on a successful one. As a Bonus Action, you can move the sphere up to 30 feet. If it enters a creature's space, the creature makes the saving throw against the sphere's damage. When using a higher-level spell slot, the damage increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 2.
